Concat.Markov: A/nd/or A/nth/or Ag/n/ar Ag/n/ur Agr/o/nn Ar/n/st/ei/nn As/b/jar/n As/b/jor/n As/b/ro/nd As/g/or/n As/gr/o/nd As/mu/nd/or Au/th/u/n B/eo/gr/i/m B/eo/w/u/lf B/jar/n B/jor/n B/ra/nd Br/o/ck Br/o/nd Br/o/nn D/a/g D/a/gf/i/nn D/a/gn Ei/dr/i/th Ei/n/ar/r Ei/r/ic/k Er/l/e/nd F/a/st/u/lf F/o/lk/i Fl/ae/m/i/ng Fr/o/th/i G/eir/ Hr/o/a/ld/or Hr/o/ar Hr/o/th/g/ar Ur/ist

Repeat.Words: anvil arm axe bastard battle bear beard beer bellows belly belt blade bold boulder boulder brave buckle chest chin chisel copper craft dark dark deep deep delver diamond digger doom drinker face fall fast feast fine fire fire fist flame flint forge gate gem glory glory gold gold gravel gravel great grim grim grip ground grumble grumble guard guts hammer hard hard heart heavy helm hide honour humble iron iron jewel keg labour lord master master metal might miner mood mountain old pale pebble pebble pick proud red rock rocky rough ruby rust rust rusty shield silver silver slayer slumber smith snow song soul spell spirit steel steel stone stone stout stout strength strike strong strong thunder tough troll true war winter wise wise worg
